title: Architecture of a k-Means Neural Network
description: A visual representation of the k-Means algorithm implemented as a single-layer neural network, showing the flow of data and the competitive learning process.
relationships: Input data vectors are fed to the input layer
Each competitive neuron calculates the distance between its weight vector and the input
The WTA mechanism selects the neuron with the smallest distance (the winner)
The winner's weight vector is updated to move closer to the input vector
